issue_body_preview: The links at http://play.witheve.com/#/examples/quickstart.eve are broken. For example, the first link for "record" points to https://witheve.github.io/docs/handbook/records/. This gets redirected to http://docs.witheve.com/handbook/records/, which is not found. Same for other links on the page.
test_description_zh: 访问 play.witheve.com 的 quickstart.eve 示例页面，点击页面中的文档链接（如 'record' 链接），观察链接是否能正确导航到对应的文档页面。
expected_result_zh: 点击页面中的文档链接后，应正确跳转到有效的文档页面，页面正常加载显示文档内容，不出现 404 Not Found 错误。
